title: micropholis emarginata
intro: Micropholis emarginata, also known as the Apuntes Tree, is a medicinal plant species that belongs to the Sapotaceae family. It is primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Micropholis emarginata include the treatment of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in wound healing and as an anti-diarrheal agent; herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures made from its leaves and bark.
